LanguageData.AM_AbandonedBigBread.label: abandoned big bread
LanguageData.AM_AbandonedBus.label: abandoned bus
LanguageData.AM_AbandonedForklift.description: An ancient forklift, whose parts are completely useless, was abandoned.
LanguageData.AM_AbandonedForklift.label: abandoned forklift
LanguageData.AM_Amublance.description: A damaged and corroded ancient vehicle.
LanguageData.AM_Amublance.label: ancient amublance
LanguageData.AM_AncientCashRegister.description: The cash register commonly found in ancient supermarkets has been damaged.
LanguageData.AM_AncientCashRegister.label: ancient cash register
LanguageData.AM_AncientRevolvingDoorA.description: An ancient glass revolving door, now it's stuck

LanguageData.AM_ArmoredGate.description: Armored gates, commonly found in some underground military facilities.

LanguageData.AM_AtriumA.description: The atrium of an ancient shopping mall, where light can penetrate from the ceiling, makes the entire mall bright.
LanguageData.AM_AtriumA.label: atrium

LanguageData.AM_AtriumB.label: atrium

LanguageData.AM_AtriumCorridorNorth.label: atrium

LanguageData.AM_BlockedElevators.description: This escalator is blocked by debris and cannot pass through from here.

LanguageData.AM_BlockedStairsD.label: blocked staircase

LanguageData.AM_ConstructionSite.label: construction site

LanguageData.AM_Effigy.label: modern art sculpture

LanguageData.AM_EmptyCans.label: empty cans
